pr.title: GolfStudent v2 14L: d=352, Value Residuals, GPTQ-lite, Schedule-Free, Muon+EMA

output.summary: Hybrid 14-layer LM interleaves GatedMLP recurrence with attention, ups d to 352, adds gated value residuals, GPTQ-lite INT8+zlib, Muon/EMA with schedule-free finish.
techniques: Gated MLP + attention layers with value residual skip gates
Muon optimizer with EMA and constant LR-floor final 120s
GPTQ-lite per-row INT8 quantization plus zlib compression
